candidate_blockers.detail: Pressure-probe ladder control is diagnostic-only evidence.
Per-face one-sided pressure support is not implemented yet.
Rows reuse one flow snapshot and do not advance coupled FSI.
No coupled or Fluent comparison run is part of this artifact.

deferred_strategies.reason: Symmetric cell-pair selection requires a separate implementation and artifact proof.

rows.scope_limit: shared snapshot sampling-only pressure probe ladder control diagnostic on archived shared preflow velocity/pressure/obstacle fields; does not advance coupled FSI and does not claim Fluent parity.
